about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Discover the Essence of Mexico at El Comal Mexican Restaurant - A Culinary Voyage of Flavor and Tradition" where the soul of Mexico comes alive through every bite. Step into our inviting space and embark on a culinary voyage that celebrates the rich tapestry of Mexican flavors and traditions.
As well as offering an extensive menu, we have a full bar with Hand Crafted Margaritas and specialty cocktails.

At El Comal we are dedicated to bringing the rich and diverse flavors of Mexican cuisine to your table. Our menu is a culinary journey that showcases the best of Mexico's regional dishes, prepared with authentic ingredients and traditional cooking techniques. From sizzling fajitas and mouthwatering enchiladas to savory tamales and flavorful guacamole, each dish is a masterpiece crafted with passion and love.
about.subheading: El Comal Mexican Restaurant - Mt. Juliet

menu.disclaimer: *NOTICE: FOODS COOKED TO ORDER, CONSUMING RAW OR UNDERCOOKED MEATS, POULTRY, SEAFOOD, SHELLFISH OR EGGS MAY INCREASE YOUR RISK FOR FOOD BORNE ILLNESSES, ESPECIALLY IF YOU HAVE CERTAIN MEDICAL CONDITIONS. TO OUR GUESTS WITH FOOD SENSITIVITIES OR ALLERGIES: WE CAN NOT ENSURE THAT MENU ITEMS DO NOT CONTAIN INGREDIENTS THAT MIGHT CAUSE AN ALLERGIC REACTION.
